creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
Wow, this surprises me!

Because, my testing showed that vt newcons breaks suspend/resume with _all_ graphics cards I have that are not supported by the Intel/AMD drm-kmod drivers, eg. Nvidia, Matrox, ATI, S3, SiS.
So I supposed that resuming with vt as console _only_ works if KMS drivers are installed/loaded.

So I felt surprised reading that resuming with vt newcons worked for the 'Mobile 915GM/GMS/910GML Express Graphics Controller', even when drm-kmod had not been loaded.

If you have the time, I would be very happy if you could check whether suspend/resume works on your computer with the SC console, too.
You can enable the SC console by adding this line in /boot/loader.conf and rebooting:

kern.vty="sc"
